audience_policies.source_phrase: The pass provides 50% off up to 4 ferry tickets from Boston to Spectacle Island and Georges Island or from Hingham to Peddocks Island. This is a SEASONAL pass available mid-May through early October. Spring Schedule *May 15 - June 14: Thursdays through Sundays - Georges Island Su

coupon.source_phrase_block: The pass provides 50% off up to 4 ferry tickets from Boston to Spectacle Island and Georges Island or from Hingham to Peddocks Island. This is a SEASONAL pass available mid-May through early October. Spring Schedule *May 15 - June 14: Thursdays through Sundays - Georges Island Summer Schedule *June 16 - September 1: Daily - Georges Island *June 15 - September 7: Daily (Except Tuesdays) - Peddocks Island from Hingham *July 15 - September 1: Daily Spectacle Island
